lines.speaker: Morgan
lines.text: How are you doing with the quest?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm still working on it.

lines.speaker: Morgan
lines.text: Please hurry! Every day we live in fear that we will be the vampyre's next victim!

lines.speaker: Morgan
lines.text: Please please help us, bold adventurer!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's the problem?

lines.speaker: Morgan
lines.text: Our little village has been dreadfully ravaged by an evil vampyre! He lives in the basement of the manor to the north, we need someone to get rid of him once and for all!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, I'm up for an adventure.

lines.speaker: Morgan
lines.text: I think first you should seek help. I have a friend who is a retired vampyre hunter, his name is Dr. Harlow. He may be able to give you some tips. He can normally be found in the Blue Moon Inn in Varrock, he's a bit

lines.speaker: Morgan
lines.text: of an old soak these days. Mention his old friend Morgan, I'm sure he wouldn't want me killed by a vampyre.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll look him up then.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, vampyres are scary!

lines.speaker: Morgan
lines.text: I don't blame you.

lines.speaker: Dr Harlow
lines.text: Buy me a drrink pleassh...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll just go and buy one.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Here you go.

lines.speaker: Dr Harlow
lines.text: Cheersh matey...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So tell me how to kill vampyres then.

lines.speaker: Dr Harlow
lines.text: Yesh Yesh vampyres, I was very good at killing em once...

lines.speaker: Dr Harlow
lines.text: Don't forget to take your stake with you, otherwise he'll just regenerate. Yes, you must have a stake to finish it off... I'd give you a stake but you've got one in your inventory.

lines.speaker: Dr Harlow
lines.text: Don't forget to take your stake with you, otherwise he'll just regenerate. Yes, you must have a stake to finish it off... I'd give you a stake but you've already got one stored somewhere.

lines.speaker: Dr Harlow
lines.text: Well, you're going to need a stake, otherwise he'll just regenerate. Yes, you must have a stake to finish it off... I just happen to have one with me.

lines.speaker: Dr Harlow
lines.text: You'll need a hammer as well, to drive it in properly, your everyday general store hammer will do. One last thing... It's wise to carry garlic with you, vampyres are somewhat weakened if they can smell garlic. Morgan

lines.speaker: Dr Harlow
lines.text: always liked garlic, you should try his house. But remember, a vampyre is still a dangerous foe!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thank you very much!

lines.speaker: Dr Harlow
lines.text: Buy me a drrink pleassh...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, you've had enough.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Morgan needs your help!

lines.speaker: Dr Harlow
lines.text: Morgan you shhay..?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: His village is being terrorised by a vampyre! He told me to ask you about how I can stop it.

lines.speaker: Dr Harlow
lines.text: Buy me a beer... then I'll teash you what you need to know...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But this is your friend Morgan we're talking about!

lines.speaker: Dr Harlow
lines.text: Buy ush a drink anyway...

sections.title: Attacking Count Draynor with garlic in the inventory
Attempting to kill Count Draynor without a stake in the inventory
Attempting to kill Count Draynor with a stake but no hammer in the inventory
